tweets.text: 🚀 Excited to announce the initial release of Commit Content Tracker! An AI-powered tool that turns your GitHub commits & PRs into engaging X threads automatically. Let’s dive into what it can do! #DevTools
🔗 It integrates with GitHub webhooks to catch push & PR events, ensuring you never miss a chance to share your work. Built with TypeScript and runs serverlessly on GitHub Actions. Pure magic! ✨
🤖 Powered by Grok API, it crafts natural, human-like content. Plus, a Telegram bot lets you review drafts before posting. Total control over your narrative! How cool is that?

📢 Supports X thread publishing & multi-project configs, so you can manage content for all your repos effortlessly. Want to showcase your commits with style? Check it out: https://github.com/amitayks/commit-content-creatore
What do you think? Could this change how devs share their progress on X? Drop your thoughts below—I’d love to hear! 💬 #DevTools #Automation #AI #CommitContentTracker #GitHub #TypeScript
